raw_response: {"detections":[{"biasType":"Subjective Qualifying Adjectives","biasedText":"apply their ink-stained skills to capture the foibles, memes, hypocrisies and other head-slapping events in the world of politics.","explanation":"Uses loaded, value-laden terms (“foibles,” “hypocrisies,” “head-slapping”) that characterize politics negatively in the author’s voice."},{"biasType":"Unsubstantiated claims","biasedText":"The fruits of these labors are hundreds of cartoons that entertain and enrage readers of all political stripes.","explanation":"Asserts effects on readers (“entertain and enrage”) and breadth of impact (“all political stripes”) without evidence."},{"biasType":"Opinion Statements Presented as Fact","biasedText":"Here's an offering of the best of this week's crop, picked fresh off the Toonosphere.","explanation":"Labels the selection as “the best,” a subjective judgment presented as definitive without attribution."}]}

detections.biasedText: apply their ink-stained skills to capture the foibles, memes, hypocrisies and other head-slapping events in the world of politics.
detections.explanation: Uses loaded, value-laden terms (“foibles,” “hypocrisies,” “head-slapping”) that characterize politics negatively in the author’s voice.

detections.biasedText: The fruits of these labors are hundreds of cartoons that entertain and enrage readers of all political stripes.
detections.explanation: Asserts effects on readers (“entertain and enrage”) and breadth of impact (“all political stripes”) without evidence.

detections.biasedText: Here's an offering of the best of this week's crop, picked fresh off the Toonosphere.
detections.explanation: Labels the selection as “the best,” a subjective judgment presented as definitive without attribution.
